title: carex goodenowii var. stolonifera
intro: Carex goodenowii var. stolonifera, also known as Good's sedge, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sedge family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and soothing sore throats, due to its expectorant and demulcent properties. Carex goodenowii var. stolonifera is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, although its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal plant require further research and validation.
